overview: A personal CTF writeup portfolio with a block-based admin editor, syntax-highlighted code blocks, image uploads with lightbox, and a searchable/filterable public index of all writeups.
features: Block-based writeup editor with code snippets, images, and rich text
Syntax highlighting with line numbers and copy button for all code blocks
Image upload with auto-resize and lightbox viewer
Admin panel protected by Internet Identity login
Homepage with search, filter by category/difficulty/tags, and sort
Writeup view with table of contents, hidden flag reveal, and share buttons
Dark mode that persists across sessions
Related writeups by category on each writeup page
